calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-02-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar May-26-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
This cause came on for Default Prove Up
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Marta Vallejo, CSR: Sara Lerschen
Appearances:
Douglas A. Holloway, Esq. For Plaintiff Trininy Capital Corp., the Manager/Owner Ernest Knowles, also present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff: Trinity Capital Corporation and against the defendants: PLN Enterprises, Inc. dba Westport Wash & Dry, Paul Nelson and Loretta Nelson
Principal of $33,416.87
Attorney's fees of $2,500.00
Costs of $337.50
Interest of $495.10
For the total of $36,748.47
Plaintiff is also entitled to immediate possession of the leased equipment as described in the judgment.

Judgment signed in open court.
